data.title: Glassnode: Market rebound leads to record high in short position liquidation since the "October 11 crash".
data.description: Glassnode posted on the X platform that the market rebound led to a record high in short position liquidations since the "1011 crash." According to Coinglass data, total liquidations across the network reached $679 million in the past 24 hours, including $578 million in short positions and $101 million in long positions.

data.title: DASH briefly broke through 86 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 45.47%.
data.description: OKX market data shows that DASH briefly broke through 86 USDT and is currently trading at 85.42 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 45.47%.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Paulson: A small rate cut later this year may be more appropriate.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Paulson stated that the current federal funds rate level remains slightly tight, and a small rate cut later this year might be more appropriate. (Jinshi)

data.title: Polymarket trader makes $330k in a day predicting sports results
data.description:
A newly registered trader on Polymarket, one of the most widely used online cryptocurrency prediction market websites, has managed to turn a nearly $330,000 profit in a single day. Going by the name of NBA101, the trader has made 48 predictions since they joined earlier this month, most of them sports-related. The latest was an $82,000 bet on Sacramento Kings vs. Los Angeles Lakers on January 13, which turned a 312% profit of approximately $256,500 for a total win of more or less $338,000 when the Sacramento team beat the L
source: https://finbold.com/polymarket-trader-makes-330k-in-a-day-predicting-sports-results/

data.title: Crypto Market Surge Triggers Major Short Liquidations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Glassnode indicates that the recent rebound in the cryptocurrency market has led to liquidations totaling $684 million over the past 24 hours. Short positions accounted for $577 million of these liquidations. This surge has resulted in the largest short liquidation event since the '1011 crash.'

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 96,000 USDT with a 3.52% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 14, 2026, 14:46 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 96,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 96,027.96875 USDT, with a narrowed 3.52% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Figure launches an on-chain stock and lending platform, supporting the issuance of real equity on-chain and direct stock lending.
data.description: Blockchain lending company Figure Technology Solutions announced the launch of its on-chain stock and lending platform, designed to reduce intermediaries in traditional stock lending. The platform, named On-Chain Public Equity Network (OPEN), supports the issuance and direct lending of shares on the blockchain without the need for traditional intermediaries. It will allow companies to issue equity on Figure's Provenance blockchain. Unlike many tokenization efforts, OPEN's blockchain shares are not synthetic versions of listed stocks, but rather represent actual equity ownership, which shareholders can lend or pledge. (Bloomberg)

data.title: BNB Surpasses 940 USDT with a 3.10% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 14, 2026, 14:39 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 940 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 940.200012 USDT, with a narrowed 3.10% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Crypto stocks opened higher across the board in the US, with ETHZilla rising 1.75%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 113 points, the S&P 500 fell 0.44%, and the Nasdaq fell 0.6%. Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose, with ETHZilla up 1.75%, Circle up 3.87%, Robinhood up 0.35%, Coinbase up 1.25%, and Strategy up 3.86%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Algorand Foundation Relocates Headquarters to Delaware
data.description: According to Odaily, after operating in Singapore for some time, the Algorand Foundation has announced its return to the United States, with its headquarters set to be established in Delaware. Algorand Foundation CEO Staci Warden also revealed the appointment of new board members. These include Abra founder and CEO Bill Barhydt, who will serve as the board chairman, as well as former MoneyGram CEO Alex Holmes and former acting director of the U.S. Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN) Michael Mosier.

data.title: Solana Highlights Starknet's Market Valuation Despite Low Activity
data.description: According to Odaily, Solana recently commented on X platform about Starknet's market performance. The post noted that Starknet has only 8 daily active users and records merely 10 transactions per day. Despite this low level of activity, Starknet maintains a market capitalization of $1 billion and a fully diluted valuation (FDV) of $15 billion.

data.title: Canaan Technology Reports December Bitcoin Production and Annual Holdings
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Canaan Technology released its unaudited operational report for December, revealing a production of 86 BTC for the month. The company expanded its computing power to 9.91 EH/s, with an operational capacity of 7.65 EH/s by the end of the month. Throughout the year, Canaan Technology accumulated 1,750 BTC and 3,951 ETH.

In 2025, Canaan's asset management strategy focused on reinvestment and reserve expansion. The company mined an additional 1,091 BTC and purchased 128 BTC from the market. To cover electricity and related expenses, 776 BTC were spent. Additionally, the company received 13 BTC from sales-related income and 0.83 BTC from interest income. As a result, by December 31, 2025, Canaan's Bitcoin holdings increased to 1,750 BTC, marking a 35% rise from 1,293 BTC on December 31, 2024.

Meanwhile, the company's ETH holdings grew from 3 ETH on December 31, 2024, to 3,951 ETH by December 31, 2025. This increase was primarily due to converting stablecoin proceeds from mining machine sales into 3,931 ETH, along with an additional 17 ETH from sales-related inflows.

data.title: The Smarter Web Company Sees Significant Growth in 2023
data.description: According to Foresight News, The Smarter Web Company, a Bitcoin treasury firm based in the United Kingdom, has experienced a notable increase of 48.6% this year, with its current value at $0.66.

data.title: The Algorand Foundation is returning to the United States, with its headquarters to be located in Delaware and new board members appointed.
data.description: After operating in Singapore for some time, the Algorand Foundation announced its return to the United States, with its headquarters to be located in Delaware. Algorand Foundation CEO Staci Warden also stated that new board members have been appointed, including Abra founder and CEO Bill Barhydt as chairman, and former MoneyGram CEO Alex Holmes, former acting director of the Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN), Michael Mosier, among others. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Solana: Starknet has only 8 daily active users and a daily transaction volume of only 10.
data.description: Solana posted on the X platform: "Starknet has only 8 daily active users and 10 daily transactions, yet it still has a market capitalization of $1 billion and an FDV of $15 billion."

data.title: Moonbirds' parent company announces "Birbillions" strategy: targeting Pop Mart, aiming for $1 billion in physical revenue.
data.description: Orange Cap Games (OCG), the parent company of Moonbirds, officially released the "Birbillions Thesis" white paper, proposing a hybrid business model of "physical collectibles + crypto memes." The white paper points out that the core pain point in the crypto industry lies in the disconnect between "serious companies" and "absurd memes." OCG aims to capture the attention of non-crypto users through physical toy distribution (via channels such as Asmodee and GTS), using the $BIRB token as a value coordination layer. Data shows that OCG's physical revenue reached $8 million in its second year of operation. The argument claims that its goal is to become the first crypto-native consumer company to achieve $1 billion in annual revenue through physical sales, without relying on transaction fees or token dumping.

data.title: Canaan Technology: In 2025, it held a total of 1,750 BTC and 3,951 ETH.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Canaan Creative released its unaudited Bitcoin mining operations update for December, disclosing that the company mined 86 BTC in December and expanded its online hashrate to 9.91 EH/s, reaching an operating hashrate of 7.65 EH/s at the end of the month. The company also projected to hold a total of 1,750 BTC and 3,951 ETH for the entire year of 2025. (PRNewswire)

data.title: UK Rolls Back Digital ID Plan for Work Checks Following Public Opposition
data.description:
The UK government has rolled back its mandatory digital ID plan for workers after public opposition surged, forcing a policy retreat ahead of a planned 2029 rollout.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/uk-rolls-back-digital-id-plan-for-work-checks-following-public-opposition/

data.title: Senate Crypto Bill Hands Treasury “Patriot Act–Style” Surveillance Powers — Galaxy Sounds Alarm
data.description:
Galaxy Research warns that the Senate’s draft crypto market structure bill could hand the U. S. Treasury broad surveillance powers over DeFi, drawing comparisons to the Patriot Act.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/senate-crypto-bill-treasury-patriot-act-surveillance-powers-galaxy/

data.title: Crossmint Secures MiCA License for Crypto Services Across EU
data.description:
According to Odaily, Crossmint, a provider of crypto payment infrastructure, has received the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) license from the Spanish Securities Market Commission (CNMV). This authorization allows Crossmint to operate as a compliant crypto asset service provider (CASP) across all 27 European Union member states, offering stablecoin infrastructure services.

The license covers three main CASP activities: bidirectional exchange between fiat and cryptocurrencies, custodial services for crypto assets, and cross-wallet and cross-blockchain transfer services. Crossmint co-founder Rodri Fernández Touza noted that with the MiCA transition period ending in July, many remittance companies, payment platforms, and emerging banks are now seeking partners with MiCA licenses. Non-compliant providers may face the risk of being forced out of the market.
